creator: exploringlondon
caption:
So much happening in London this weekend! Here are the details of three pop-ups worth visiting! ❤️

1. @carolinaherrera Good Girl pop-up
📍 @coventgardenldn
✨ Free fragrance samples, personalised poems, a chance to win a full-size scent, coffees and pastries!
🗓️ 6th-8th March, 10am-7pm

2. @lorealparis Worth It pop-up
📍 @oldspitalfieldsmarket 
✨ Free lipstick and engraving with a @bootsuk card, send a postcard to a loved one, free freshly made crepes!
🗓️ Saturday 7th 10am-6pm, Sunday 8th 10am-5pm

3. @dove.uki x @bridgertonnetflix pop-up
📍 @batterseapwrstn 
✨ Free full-sized Dove products, immersive walkthrough with photo opportunities including the copper bathtub!
🗓️ 6th-8th March, 11am-7pm
